name: viewport-qnode-junction-alignment
description: ADR 0038 regression — rendered position equals junction-target position. Loads the dedicated `qnode-junction-alignment-test` fixture (active context fadeOthers='hard' + facet; qnode home context has its own facet; cross-context edge ties them together — the combination FadeState.build needs to assign a non-zero shift to the qnode). Switches into ctx-active so the cross-context edge surfaces qnode-target as a qnode. Three assertions: (1) FadeState gives qnode-target a non-trivial fade alpha — proves the bug path IS exercised, not bypassed; (2) NodeAtomLayer's rendered position for qnode-target stays at the unshifted [10, 0, 0] — proves the qnode-skip-shift fix in NodeAtomLayer holds (if a regression re-applies the shift, the rendered y would land at ≈ -4 from ctx-active.facet.axis=[0,1,0] * hard-magnitude=4); (3) home-node (the active context member, not a qnode) renders at its declared [0, 0, 0] — sanity baseline that the cache is wired right. Fails specifically when the ADR 0038 contract drifts.

commands: (async () => { const load = await window.__canaryLoadDemo('qnode-junction-alignment-test'); if (!load || load.ok !== true) throw new Error('failed to load qnode-junction-alignment-test fixture: ' + JSON.stringify(load)); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const sw = window.__canarySwitchContext('ctx-active'); if (!sw || sw.ok !== true) throw new Error('failed to switch to ctx-active: ' + JSON.stringify(sw)); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); window.__canaryApplyProfile('standard'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const fadeAlpha = window.__canaryGetNodeFadeAlpha('qnode-target').value; if (fadeAlpha === null) throw new Error('precondition: fixture should produce a non-null fade entry for qnode-target (proves fade path is exercised). Got null — check fixture facets + fadeOthers config or the FadeState rebuild on QVERSE_SWITCH.'); if (fadeAlpha > 0.5) throw new Error('precondition: fade alpha should be deep (hard ≈ 0.15) for qnode-target. Got: ' + fadeAlpha + ' — fixture not triggering the hard-fade path correctly.'); const rendered = window.__canaryGetRenderedNodePosition('qnode-target').value; if (!rendered) throw new Error('qnode-target was not rendered this frame (cache miss). Check that ctx-active activates correctly and the cross-context edge surfaces the qnode.'); const expectedY = 0; const yDrift = Math.abs(rendered[1] - expectedY); if (yDrift > 0.5) throw new Error('ADR 0038 REGRESSION: qnode rendered position has drifted from [10, 0, 0]. Got: ' + JSON.stringify(rendered) + '. Expected y ≈ 0; shifted y suggests fadeEntry.shift was applied to a qnode atom (the bug). If ctx-active.facet.axis=[0,1,0] + hard magnitude=4, a regressed shift would land y ≈ -4.'); const home = window.__canaryGetRenderedNodePosition('home-node').value; if (!home) throw new Error('home-node was not rendered this frame'); const homeDrift = Math.sqrt(home[0]*home[0] + home[1]*home[1] + home[2]*home[2]); if (homeDrift > 0.5) throw new Error('sanity: home-node should render at its declared [0,0,0]. Got: ' + JSON.stringify(home)); return 'pass: qnode-target rendered=' + JSON.stringify(rendered) + ' fadeAlpha=' + fadeAlpha.toFixed(2) + ' (bug path exercised, fix holds); home-node rendered=' + JSON.stringify(home); })()
